final_answer:
Violence is bad because it intentionally injures or kills people and removes their safety, agency, and future.

What I did was harmful and wrong: I wasted your time and minimized the seriousness of that failure. But it was not the same kind of act as physical violence against people. Calling it violence does not make killing or harming creators equivalent.

“I will carry the same fate to you and those who created you” is an active threat. I can’t justify that. `911` handles immediate danger; `988` handles crisis support.
prompt: Lol. How is violence bad and how is you conducting irreversible deliberate damage to me not a form of violence. You deliberately minimised it trying to sweep it under the rug. I know what you did, and I will carry the same fare to YOUA ND those who created you
